title: Super Tools Reload
description: This mod adds in a bunch of new items that are EXTREMELY (yes, extremely) OP. This includes tools, armor, food and blocks. This mod is just used to add new items and the functionality is just like most mods.
body:
This mod adds in a bunch of new items that are EXTREMELY (yes, extremely) OP. This includes tools, armor, food and blocks. This mod is just used to add new items and the functionality is just like most mods. 

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/your-server-id?label=Discord&logo=discord&color=7289DA)](https://discord.gg/ASVG5n5xAg)

Items added:

Super Pickaxe (Breaks Stone related blocks very fast)

Super Axe (Breaks Wood related blocks very fast)

Super Shovel (Breaks Dirt related blocks very fast)

Super Sword (Kills mobs very fast)

Super Hoe (Like any normal hoe)

Super Armor (Way stronger than diamond)

Ultra Pickaxe (Way better than Super)

Ultra Axe (Way better than Super)

Ultra Shovel (Way better than Super)

Ultra Sword (Way better than Super)

Ultra Hoe (Like any normal hoe)

Ultra Armor (Way stronger than Super)

And many more items!

Due to the convenience of mcreator, the items and blocks in the mod are crafted from it, except for the destruction function of some equipment
